name: CCTV-Smartphone-AI-Monitoring
description: LAN-based smartphone-powered AI monitoring framework with structured event output for data acquisition and analysis. （本地监控 + AI 部署）
summaryZh: LAN-based smartphone-powered AI monitoring framework with structured event output for data acquisition and analysis. （本地监控 + AI 部署） 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
